# CBCentralManagerScanOptionSolicitedServiceUUIDsKey

**Global Variable**

An array of service UUIDs that you want to scan for.

## Declaration

```swift
let CBCentralManagerScanOptionSolicitedServiceUUIDsKey: String
```

## Discussion

The array is an instance of [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSArray], and uses [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBUUID] objects to represent the UUIDs to scan for.

Specifying this scan option causes the central manager to also scan for peripherals soliciting any of the services contained in the array.

## Constants

- **CBCentralManagerScanOptionAllowDuplicatesKey**: A Boolean value that specifies whether the scan should run without duplicate filtering.
